ariaSpec.usage: Indicates the tablist role for the ul element of the TabStrip.
Indicates the orientation of the tablist container element. Rendered only when vertical, as tablist defaults to horizontal.
Announces the selected state of the tab.
Announces the relation between the panel and active tab.
The content div of the tab.
Only if the component implements a feature to control whether the content should be persisted.
Refers to the tab element that controls the panel.
Scroll buttons are hidden from assistive technologies.

kbSpec.behavior: Activates the previous/next tab (vertical orientation). Navigation wraps — when end is reached the first tab is focused, when start is reached the last tab is focused.
Activates the previous/next tab (horizontal orientation). Navigation wraps — when end is reached the first tab is focused, when start is reached the last tab is focused.
Moves focus to the content of the active tab. Roving tabindex — only the active tab has tabindex=0, remaining tabs have tabindex=-1.
Moves focus back to the active tab from the panel.
Activates the focused tab (when automatic selection is disabled).
Moves focus to and activates the first tab.
Moves focus to and activates the last tab.
Removes the focused tab from the tab list.
